category_sources: source_facts.description says source code line counter; official README describes Ohcount as a source code line counter and library for counting lines of source code.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses Ohcount as the display name; source_facts.name is ohcount.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and covers overview, build, and usage context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/blackducksoftware/ohcount, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify source line counting, language detection, and command-line use.
